problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI may resolve Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 33 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
